default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss beehiiv platform optimization and growth strategies for GrowthX's AI Code newsletter](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Implement gradual subscriber onboarding (7-10k batches) to maintain deliverability](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Leverage beehiiv's web version for SEO benefits and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Utilize boosts and recommendations features for strategic newsletter growth](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Fine-tune UTM parameters and analytics reporting for client updates](https://fathom.video/share/5EkWZ7dL3iYU3jyfhFc8JWsPzTXJzS8R?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)

## Topics

### Subscriber Onboarding Strategy
